codeReview.summary: Implementation substantially matches the feature description and validation assertions for AgentDetail/IssueDetail design-system restyling (header, tab treatment, transcript styling, inline editors, comment thread, and properties panel). One high-confidence styling regression was introduced in AgentDetail due to a malformed Tailwind class token.

issues.description: Malformed class token `bg-[var(--bg-darker)]px-3` is missing a space before `px-3`, so both intended utilities are not applied (`bg-[var(--bg-darker)]` and `px-3`). This breaks styling of the newly created API key code block.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Troubleshooting for embedded Postgres shared-memory lock failures during GUI validation is not documented in mission shared state, even though it affected this worker session.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for session `53db8b05-c16f-4c4c-9035-651763f8fa83` shows repeated recovery steps (`stale lock`, `shared memory block issue`, manual `ipcrm`/process cleanup, and DB directory reset) before visual verification could proceed.

summary: Pass with one non-blocking issue: the feature meets expected behavior for detail-page design-system polish, but includes a malformed class string in AgentDetail that causes a local styling regression.
